tools.name: match_sessions
tools.description: Match a customer or priority signal to grounded Microsoft Build 2026 sessions. Returns up to `limit` on-demand sessions by default, strongest first.

signal.description: Atomic priority, challenge, initiative, or pain point.

scheduledOnly.description: When true, keep only sessions with schedule times.

requireOnDemand.description: When true, keep only sessions with on-demand recordings.

tools.name: get_session_by_code
tools.description: Return full normalized metadata for one Build 2026 session code from the authoritative events-cli catalog.
